ValidationRule.description:
This validation rule will prevent users from editing Telehealth records after it has been completed
Operations Admin System Administrator HG SysAdmin Finance New_Finance Shipping Coordinator Patient Support Rep Nico Cortes
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),"Completed"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9a"), NOT($UserRole.Id = "00E5a000001BBHR"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a000001OuCRAA0"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvl"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9G"), NOT($UserRole.Id = "00E5a000001QTSr"), NOT($UserRole.Id = "00E5a000001QTT6"), NOT($User.Id = "0055a000007g7PV") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You Can Not Edit This Opportunity Because Has Been Completed.
